mapper.sql: select ct.contract_id, ct.contract_no, ct.contract_name, ct.customer_id, ct.order_id, ct.amount, ct.sign_date, ct.start_date, ct.end_date, ct.status, ct.attachment, ct.del_flag, ct.create_by, ct.create_time, ct.update_by, ct.update_time, ct.remark, ct.belong_user_id, ct.belong_dept_id, ct.approval_count, ct.last_approval_time, cu.customer_name from crm_contract ct left join crm_customer cu on ct.customer_id = cu.customer_id
mapper.select: select count(*) from crm_payment_plan pp left join crm_order o on pp.order_id = o.order_id where o.contract_id = #{contractId} and pp.del_flag = '0' and pp.status != '1'
mapper.insert:
insert into crm_contract
contract_id, contract_no, contract_name, customer_id, order_id, amount, sign_date, start_date, end_date, status, attachment, belong_user_id, belong_dept_id, create_by, remark, create_time
#{contractId}, #{contractNo}, #{contractName}, #{customerId}, #{orderId}, #{amount}, #{signDate}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{status}, #{attachment}, #{belongUserId}, #{belongDeptId}, #{createBy}, #{remark}, sysdate()
mapper.update:
update crm_contract set del_flag = '2' where contract_id in
#{contractId}
mapper.select: where ct.del_flag = '0' and ct.status = '1' and ct.end_date is not null and ct.end_date < now()

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM crm_contract c WHERE c.del_flag = '0' AND c.status = '0' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM crm_approval_request r WHERE r.biz_id = c.contract_id AND r.biz_type = 'contract' AND r.del_flag = '0')
${params.dataScope}
mapper.update: update crm_contract set customer_id = #{newId}, update_time = sysdate() where customer_id = #{oldId}
